msName: Hepatitis B Positive Titer OR Negative/Equivocal Titer with Declination
layerInternalInstructions: Dialysis Clinic Inc: Required within 12 months of start. Must include numerical results and reference ranges. Required annually. Must be quantitative.
layerAffiliateInstructions: Dialysis Clinic Inc: Required within 12 months of start. Must include numerical results and reference ranges. Required annually. Must be quantitative.
layerTravelerInstructions: Dialysis Clinic Inc: Must include numerical results and reference ranges, required annually, and must be quantitative.
msInternalinstructions: Must include: Name and Clinic Information. POSITIVE ANTIBODY TITER results are accepted. Reactive or Immune means positive, Non-Reactive or Non-Immune means negative. If the titer is Negative, Non-Immune, or Equivocal, a Medical Solutions Hep B Declination form is required. NOTE: redact Hep C or HIV if shown. If Hep C or HIV is positive, send to clinical. Use Sterling, Labcorp, Quest or equivalent quantitative ordering labels.
msAffiliateinstructions: Provide a positive antibody titer, or if the titer is negative/non-immune/equivocal, provide the titer plus a Medical Solutions Hep B declination form.
msTravelerinstructions: Upload Hep B evidence showing either a positive antibody titer or a negative/non-immune/equivocal titer together with a Medical Solutions Hep B declination form. Include all pages.
